privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic quality alert named 'Coating Peeling - Large Cabinet' that is created during task setup. The alert must be assigned to the Administrator user (id=2, name='Administrator'), the default admin user in Odoo 17. The alert relates to a large furniture cabinet product with coating defects. The occupation and industry metadata appear to be task context descriptors (Quality Assurance Supervisor role in Furniture Distribution industry) rather than actual database fields.
